title: Informed Consent to Participate in Interviews
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"6k70h","text":"This informed consent form was used to obtain each participant’s approval to voluntarily take part in research interviews. Each participant signed an informed consent form outlining the purposes and procedures of the\nresearch, the profiles of the researchers, the dissemination of results, and the rights of participants before, during, and after the study.
